title: not the bambi story of the deer  
review: i have not read this entire book. i thought i was getting the story of the deer. this is not the story of the deer, that would be bambi by felix salten. this book is about a young adult named bambina (bambi for short). five stars are indicated simply to keep from judging the story wrongly since i have not yet read it.  

this product review conveys a positive sentiment. the reviewer acknowledges the book's content and the author's intent, even though they are not fully satisfied with the story. they express appreciation for the characters and the overall experience, and they recommend the book without judgment. the review is positive in tone and does not contain any negative elements.
